entity.summary: Sui decentralized exchange and automated-market-maker protocol associated with the Haedal ecosystem, supporting spot token swaps and liquidity-based trading activity.
entity.notes: The current first-party Haedal domain remains reachable. DefiLlama independently classifies Haedal AMM Protocol as a Sui AMM DEX and reports current TVL, fee, revenue, and DEX-volume surfaces. Confidence is medium because the public first-party root site presents the broader Haedal ecosystem rather than a detailed AMM-only documentation surface in this review pass.

evidence.title: Haedal official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party Haedal ecosystem domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Haedal AMM Protocol metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Haedal AMM Protocol as a decentralized exchange on Sui with AMM classification and current TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX-volume metrics.

evidence.title: Haedal AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Haedal AMM Protocol as a Sui decentralized exchange.
